calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel for Petitioner.

The Court raised the issue of distribution having been made without a Court order, asked Counsel if he advised his Client that she must not make any distributions without a Court order, spoke of the procedure/requirement with respect to notice regarding an amended petition, and questions when the bequests were made and what happened to the personal property. Mr. Wrobel stated that the Petitioner was over eager and cut a check to Gina and Gregory, asked the Court to approve it/allow it, and stated that it was made clear to the Petitioner that what she did was inappropriate and beyond her powers. Mr. Wrobel also stated that he believes the bequests were done before March 9, 2018, that they weren't able to get receipts signed until recently, that the Petitioner took possession of the personal property, that he believes the Petitioner took title of the vehicle to herself and acknowledged that this should have been reflected. In addition, Mr. Wrobel stated that he has not been advised of anybody opposing this. The Court noted that if the bequests were done after the above mentioned date, interest would be due to those two beneficiaries. The Petition for Final Distribution is under submission. The Court advised Counsel that it will not approve the actions of the Administrator as they were not appropriate.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-28-2018 Continued To Sep-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel for and with Hermie Domingo (Petitioner).

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary, but will not admit the unsigned conditional envelope (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Continued To May-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
